ITitleUIPlugin

ITitleUIPlugin implements the UI plug-in interface to the Xbox Drop-in UI engine. The engine calls ITitleUIPlugin methods to provide user interface elements and interaction. Titles can provide their own implementation or use the default ITitleUIPlugin obtained with UIXCreateUIPlugin.

Method Description
Clear Destroys all items in the specified list box object.
CreateObject Called by the Xbox Drop-in UI engine to create a new UI object.
DestroyObject Called by the Xbox Drop-in UI engine to destroy a UI object.
DestroyScreenObjects Destroys all UI objects on the specified screen.
DoWork Performs periodic work required by the UI plug-in.
GetFont Returns a pointer to the font renderer that may be used directly by some extended UIX features.
GetObjectState Gets the state of a specified UI object.
InsertItem Inserts a new text into a list box.
PassInputToObject Called by the Xbox Drop-in UI engine to forward input to a UI object so that the object can respond.
RenderObject Renders a specified UI object to the current render target.
SetObjectState Sets the state of a specified UI object.
SetPluginSupport Receives an IPluginSupport interface from the Xbox Drop-in UI engine.
SetRenderTarget Sets the plug-in's render target to the specified surface.
SetText Sets the text for a UI object.

The ITitleUIPlugin interface also supports the AddRef and Release methods. The QueryInterface method is not supported on Xbox.

Requirements

Header: Declared in Uix.h.

Import Library: Use Uix.lib.
